rationale: Both reviews identify the same non-blocker (mapValue + lemmas chosen over alternatives like compRight/postcomp/mapAlgHom) and demand a rename for the same minor reason; their suggested renames differ and have no clear winner in the shown code+docstring (which motivates the name via 'value algebra' and 'mapValue_*' lemmas). Acting on either yields an equivalent PR (just a naming variant on a new TauCeti definition), so neither improves on the original or the other.
